evidence.claim: The system adds the blood unit to the inventory with the provided details.
evidence.fact: The application tracks blood unit stock in a hospital blood bank.
evidence.user_story_span: track blood units with ABO/Rh type and collection date
evidence.fact_span: tracks blood unit stock in a hospital blood bank

evidence.claim: The user can view all tracked units in the inventory.
evidence.fact: The application captures the blood group, Rh type, and collection date of every unit to support inventory management.
evidence.user_story_span: view all tracked units in the inventory
evidence.fact_span: captures the blood group, Rh type, and collection date of every unit to support inventory management
